warnings: CPOOL is a governance/protocol token and does not represent a direct RWA claim.
Reserve, custodian, redemption, and proof-of-reserves fields are intentionally not_applicable.
No public legal opinion or regulator-supervised fund/share structure was normalized.
Market, liquidity, TVL, and volume data are time-sensitive and should be refreshed before production publication.

gradeContext.contextNote: This grade evaluates CPOOL as the Clearpool protocol utility/governance token. It does not grade CPOOL as a reserve-backed, redeemable, or fund-share RWA asset.

nextActions: Run npm run validate:classification -- --slug=clearpool-cpool from api folder.
Run npm run import:asset -- clearpool-cpool after validation.
Refresh CoinGecko and DeFiLlama market metrics before publication.
Manually verify each non-Ethereum bridge/token address against chain explorers and Clearpool docs.
Consider adding a separate asset entry for specific Clearpool credit pool tokens or USDX T-Pool exposure if Nexus wants direct RWA claim assets.
